title: Substantial Swords
description: A Resource Pack that makes held swords larger and more exciting while also fitting the vanilla style.
body:
# Substantial Swords

This pack makes held swords larger while keeping the look of the default swords in mind. The item sprites in the inventory remain the same however, providing the user with a light modification to the game.

The pack is very lightweight only modifying the held sword model. Using it with other packs should not cause any issues.

![A showcase of all the sword sprites together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2338a4d1bd0d4c641cdc5479039c76cd1710a754.png)
